name: AH Realty Trust, Inc.
business: AH Realty Trust, Inc. (formerly Armada Hoffler Properties, Inc.) is a self-managed real estate investment trust (REIT) that owns and operates a diversified portfolio of high-quality retail, office, and multifamily properties, primarily in the Mid-Atlantic and Southeastern United States. The company also makes preferred equity investments in development projects through its real estate financing segment. Following a strategic restructuring announced in February 2026, the company plans to exit the multifamily sector and divest its construction and real estate financing businesses, focusing on retail and office properties.
sellsTo: Retail tenants including grocery stores and big-box retailers
Borrowers in development projects through preferred equity investments

exposures.sentence: The Company s retail portfolio is concentrated in high-barrier-to-entry markets and is anchored by credit-worthy tenants, including grocery stores and big-box retailers.
The office portfolio consists primarily of Class A office space located in mixed-use town centers, such as the Town Center of Virginia Beach and Harbor Point in Baltimore.
The Company owns and operates luxury apartment communities, primarily within its mixed-use developments.
This segment encompasses the Company s preferred equity investments.

catalysts.event: Acquired remaining partnership interest in Allied | Harbor Point
catalysts.sentence: On June 10, 2025, we acquired the remaining partnership interest in the joint venture that owns the Harbor Point Parcel 4 project, also known as Allied | Harbor Point, from our partner for the project.

catalysts.event: Exercised option to extend TD term loan maturity
catalysts.sentence: On June 26, 2025, we exercised our option to extend the maturity date of the TD term loan facility by one year, which will now mature on May 19, 2026.

On July 22, 2025, we, as parent guarantor, and the Operating Partnership, as borrower, entered into a note purchase agreement with institutional investors, pursuant to which the Operating Partnership sold, and the institutional investors purchased, an aggregate of $115.0 million aggregate principal amount of senior unsecured notes of the Operating Partnership, consisting of (a) $25.0 million aggregate principal amount of 5.57% Senior Notes, Series A, due July 22, 2028, (b) $45.0 million aggregate principal amount of 5.78% Senior Notes, Series B, due July 22, 2030 and (c) $45.0 million aggregate principal amount of 6.09% Senior Notes, Series C, due July 22, 2032 (collectively, the Notes ).

catalysts.event: Appointed Shawn J. Tibbetts as Chairman of the Board
catalysts.sentence: On October 16, 2025, we announced that our Board of Directors unanimously appointed Shawn J. Tibbetts as Chairman of the Board, effective January 1, 2026.
On December 10, 2025, we acquired Solis Gainesville II.

catalysts.event: Executed amendment for The Allure at Edinburgh
catalysts.sentence: On December 11, 2025, we executed an amendment to the operating agreement that materially changed the nature of our involvement in The Allure at Edinburgh.

catalysts.event: Announced fundamental business restructuring including exit from multifamily and launch of AH Realty Trust
catalysts.sentence: On February 16, 2026, we announced a fundamental business restructuring to eliminate complexity, strengthen the balance sheet, and relentlessly focus on operating a streamlined real estate platform.
